subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto that which was mentioned in the divine Books and recorded in His Scrolls - the knowledge of the Unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بانچه در کتب الهی مذکور و در صحفش مسطور بود فائز شدی و آن عرفان غیب
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
